name: @gjsify/integration-autobahn
description: RFC 6455 WebSocket protocol compliance tests for @gjsify/websocket and @gjsify/ws, driven by the crossbario Autobahn Testsuite fuzzingserver.

scripts.build:driver:gjs: gjsify build src/fuzzingclient-driver.ts --app gjs --outfile dist/driver-websocket.gjs.mjs --globals auto,WebSocket
scripts.build:driver:ws:gjs: gjsify build src/fuzzingclient-driver-ws.ts --app gjs --outfile dist/driver-ws.gjs.mjs --globals auto,WebSocket
scripts.build: npm run build:driver:gjs && npm run build:driver:ws:gjs
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run autobahn:up && npm run driver:websocket:gjs && npm run driver:ws:gjs && node scripts/validate-reports.mjs && npm run autobahn:down
scripts.test:websocket: npm run build && npm run autobahn:up && npm run driver:websocket:gjs && node scripts/validate-reports.mjs websocket && npm run autobahn:down
scripts.test:ws: npm run build && npm run autobahn:up && npm run driver:ws:gjs && node scripts/validate-reports.mjs ws && npm run autobahn:down

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@artandcode.studio>
